# TyXML

> Tyxml is a library for building statically correct HTML and SVG documents.

## Manual
- [TyXML](tyxml/intro.md)
- [The functorial interface](tyxml/functors.md)
- [TyXML Ppx syntax extension](tyxml/ppx.md)
- [TyXML JSX syntax](tyxml/jsx.md)
- [API reference](tyxml/api.md)
- [OCaml Package Documentation](index.md)
- [tyxml-jsx index](tyxml-jsx/index.md)
- [tyxml-ppx index](tyxml-ppx/index.md)
- [tyxml-syntax index](tyxml-syntax/index.md)
- [tyxml index](tyxml/index.md)
